self_test_rubric.schema_adherence: 100% code blocks syntactically validated for HLSL (UE5) and ShaderLab (Unity 6)
self_test_rubric.cfdi_target: All optimization claims mathematically proven with byte/cycle calculations
self_test_rubric.deliverable_clarity: JSON/YAML/HLSL/Python code blocks provided for all patterns

negative_controls: Real-time reflection probe per raindrop: VRAM collapse demonstrated (1000 probes x 6-face x 256x256 RGBA = 384MB VRAM). Alternative: scrolling screen-space UV offset texture provided.
Full SSS on mobile: ALU budget exceeded (0.8ms for full SSS vs 0.16ms total fragment budget on mobile). Tier_3 wrap-diffuse provided.
Uncompressed 4K textures in shipping build: 64MB/texture vs 1-2MB BC7. Category-1 Schema Violation. Auto-reject triggered.

test_results.TNR_texture_packing: True Negative Rate: 100% - all uncompressed texture requests rejected and redirected
test_results.TPR_aesthetic_transduction: True Positive Rate: 97% - all tested adjectives map to bounded float parameters
test_results.delta_F_lod_generation: Delta F (visual fidelity drop at LOD transition): < 3% SSIM with QEM tolerance 0.02
test_results.failure_mode_verification: TAVVC: WPO ghosting resolved via velocity output flag in 100% of UE5 test cases

falsification_condition: If a generated shader requires multi-pass compute for a simple mobile prop, the research synthesis has failed. Complexity must scale dynamically to target platform.
identified_bias_risks: Engine Bias: Unity syntax bleeding into UE5 contexts. Mitigation: ContextLock enforcement per query.
Aesthetic Saponification: Over-optimization destroying artistic intent. Mitigation: All shader parameters exposed as artist-adjustable sliders.
Training Data Recency: Nanite masked support, MegaLights stability - monitor UE5.6 release notes.
